search.query: | ```basic validation of lookup ``` savedsearch idp_validation lookup_name=$lookup_name$

condition.set: Lookup Validation Failed. Model processing stopped:

search.query: | savedsearch idp_base lookup=$lookup_name$ lob=$lob|s$ group=$group|s$ system=$system|s$ | search app=$app_id|s$
| search template_name=* | fields template_name | stats values(template_name) as filter | eval filter=mvjoin(filter, "|")

| where isnotnull(child) | rename child as parent | fields parent | eval parent=ltrim(replace(parent,"([!@#$%^&*\(\)\{\}\|\";:<>\/\\\[\]])","\\\\\1")) | stats values(parent) as filter | eval filter=mvjoin(filter, "|")

| rest report_as=text splunk_server=local /servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/base_service_template filter="{\"title\": {\"$regex\" : \"^($template_filter_regex$)$\" }}" fields="entity_rules,title" | eval value=spath(value, "{}") | mvexpand value | eval title=spath(value, "title"), id=spath(value, "_key") | eval rules=spath(value, "entity_rules{}"), value=null() | mvexpand rules | streamstats c by title | eval key=title.c, item=spath(rules, "rule_items{}") | mvexpand item | foreach field field_type value rule_type [ eval <<FIELD>>=spath(item, "<<FIELD>>")] | eval new_item=case(rule_type=="matchesblank", json_object("field", field, "field_type", field_type, "value", field, "rule_type", "matchesblank"), rule_type=="notmatchesblank", json_object("field", field, "field_type", field_type, "value", field, "rule_type", "notmatchesblank"), 1==1, item) | stats values(new_item) as item by key, title | eval new_rules=json_object("rule_condition", "AND", "rule_items", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(item, ",")))) | eval f=json_object("rule_items", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(item, ","))), "rule_condition", "AND") | stats values(f) as filter by title | eval serviceTemplatesConfig=printf("\"%s\": %s", title, json_object("entity_rules", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(filter, ","))))) | stats values(serviceTemplatesConfig) as serviceTemplatesConfig | eval serviceTemplatesConfig=printf("\"{%s}\"", replace(mvjoin(serviceTemplatesConfig, ","), "\"", "\\\""))

condition.set: ``` Generates the selected services ``` savedsearch idp_base lookup=$lookup_name$ group=$group|s$ lob=$lob|s$ system=$system|s$ $comment$ | itsiimportobjects serviceTagsFields="tag1,tag2,tag3,tag4,tag5,tag6" serviceEnabled="1" serviceTitleField=parent serviceDependentsFields=child serviceTemplateField="template_name" serviceTemplatesConfig=$result.serviceTemplatesConfig$ updateType=$updateType$ $comment$

search.query: | inputlookup $lookup_name$ where group=$group|s$ | stats c by lob
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ | dedup t2
| inputlookup $lookup_name$ where lob=$lob|s$ AND group=$group|s$ AND t1=$system|s$ AND t2=$app_id|s$ | dedup deployed

condition.set: makeresults | eval msg="Pick an action to run it"

``` Generates CURL that clones the service template with the given id ``` makeresults | eval template_name=split("$template_filter_regex$","|") | mvexpand template_name | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup title as template_name OUTPUT _key as key_found | search NOT template_name IN ($template_clone_id|s$,$p1_template_clone_id|s$,$p2_template_clone_id|s$,$p3_template_clone_id|s$) | dedup template_name | eval defaulttmplt="$template_clone_id$",p1tmplt="$p1_template_clone_id$",p2tmplt="$p2_template_clone_id$",p3tmplt="$p3_template_clone_id$", template2clone=case(isnull(key_found) AND match(template_name,"_P1$"), p1tmplt, isnull(key_found) AND match(template_name,"_P2$"), p2tmplt, isnull(key_found) AND match(template_name,"_P3$"), p3tmplt, isnull(key_found), defaulttmplt), curl_to_run=if(isnull(key_found), printf("%s 'https://%s/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/base_service_template' -H \"Content-Type:application/json\" -X POST -d '{\"title\": \"%s\",\"_key\": \"__%s__\",\"base_service_template_id\": \"%s\"}'", "$curl_cmd$", "$itsi_uri$", template_name, lower(replace(template_name, "[\s\-\.]+", "_")), template2clone), null()) | stats values(eval(case(isnotnull(key_found),template_name))) as "Existing Templates Identified", values(eval(case(isnull(key_found),template_name))) as "Templates to Create", values(curl_to_run) as "Template creation CURL commands to execute:" | fillnull value="none" "Exist Templates Identified" "Templates to Create" "Template creation CURL commands to execute:"

``` Generated payload to set the KPI urgency for the named services ``` `itoa_rest("service", "title", "^($service_filter_regex$)$", "_key,title,services_depends_on,service_tags")` | eval urg_tag=spath(value, "service_tags.tags{}")```, p=spath(value, "services_depending_on_me{}") | mvexpand p | fields - value``` | mvexpand urg_tag | search urg_tag=urg:* | rex field=urg_tag "^urg:(?<child>.+):(?<urgency>\d+)$" | join child [| inputlookup service_kpi_lookup | eval child=lower(title), child_id=_key | fields child, child_id ] | eval link=spath(value, "services_depends_on{}") | mvexpand link | where child_id=spath(link, "serviceid") | eval link=json_set(link, "overloaded_urgencies", json_object("SHKPI-".child_id, urgency)) | fields - value, splunk_server urg_tag | stats values(link) as link by id, title | eval payload=json_object("_key", id, "title", title, "services_depends_on", json(printf("[%s]", mvjoin(link, ",")))) `get_payload` | eval curl=printf("%s 'https://%s/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/service/bulk_update?is_partial_data=1' -H \"Content-Type:application/json\" -X POST -d '%s'", "$curl_cmd$", "$itsi_uri$", payload) | table curl

``` Generates the entities for the selected applications services``` savedsearch idp_base lookup=$lookup_name$ group=$group|s$ lob=$lob|s$ system=$system|s$ | where isnotnull(template_name) | dedup system_app | fields system_app,group,system,app,lob,type_name $comment$ | itsiimportobjects entityFieldMapping="" entityIdentifierFields="system_app" entityInformationalFields="group,system,app,lob,type_name" entityMergeField="system_app" entityTitleField="system_app" entityTypeField="Service Entity" updateType=$updateType$ $comment$

makeresults | eval host="$itsi_uri$", crl="$curl_cmd$", templatelist=split("$template_filter_regex$","|") | mvexpand templatelist | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup title as templatelist OUTPUT _key as key_found | lookup service_telemetry_lookup base_service_template_id as key_found OUTPUT title | eval othersvcfound=mvmap(title,if(!match(title,"($service_filter_regex$)"), "other", null())) | search NOT othersvcfound=* | stats values(host) as host values(crl) as crl values(key_found) as templateid | eval templatecomment=if(isnull(templateid) OR mvcount(templateid)<1, "##### No Templates Found to Delete -- ", null()), template_filter_regex=mvjoin(templateid,"|"), EXECUTE_WITH_CARE=printf("WARNING: Execute these commands with care. By default each command performs a GET, check the output and double check your ITSI backup before proceeding. Once the scope of the command is confirmed replace the -X GET with -X DELETE and execute:
".crl." 'https://".host."/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/entity?filter=\{\"title\":\{\"$regex\":\"^(Games - UK|Mobile \(Games\) - UK|OS Mobile \(Games\) - UK|P1 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|P2 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|dc1 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|dc2 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|k8s dc1 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|k8s dc2 Mobile \(Games\) - UK)$\"\}\}' -X GET
".crl." 'https://".host."/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/service?filter=\{\"title\":\{\"$regex\":\"^(Games - UK|Mobile \(Games\) - UK|OS Mobile \(Games\) - UK|P1 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|P2 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|dc1 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|dc2 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|k8s dc1 Mobile \(Games\) - UK|k8s dc2 Mobile \(Games\) - UK)$\"\}\}' -X GET
%s ".crl." 'https://".host."/servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/base_service_template?filter=\{\"_key\":\{\"$regex\":\"^(%s)$\"\}\}' -X GET", templatecomment, template_filter_regex) | table EXECUTE_WITH_CARE

html.div:
WARNING!
Failed to build Template Filter. Cannot complete action "3. Build Model" without valid template configuration
Ensure action "1. Create Templates (curl)" completed successfully before continuing

div.b: Review Tokens to ensure correct values are set as expected, use disable import to validate without running any breaking updates.

html.table:
Info Tokens
Token Value
Use Confitsi $use_confitsi$
Import State Comment token set to: $comment$
Group $group|s$
Line of Business $lob|s$
system $system|s$
Current Action $dd_action$
Template Filter List $template_filter_regex$
Service Title Filter $service_filter_regex$ entity_filter_regex
Service Entity Title Filter $entity_filter_regex$

div.b: For Template Filter Config ensure it contains all expected templates or services will not generate with correct entity filters.

panel.title: Actions Panel for generating various bits of config

viz.title: Service Tree - select a node to view both proposed and existing config

search.query: | where isnotnull(child) | dedup parent child | table parent, child

| search parent="$clicked$" | stats values(*) as * by parent | eval tags=mvappend(tag1, tag2, tag3, tag4, tag5, mvjoin(tag6, " ")) | eval fields=split(printf("lob: %s|group: %s|site: %s|system: %s|app : %s|function: %s|urgency: %s", lob,group,site,system,app,function,urgency), "|") | table parent* template_name child* tags pattern fields | transpose

table.title: Existing Service Config - if it exists

search.query:
| rest report_as=text splunk_server=local /servicesNS/nobody/SA-ITOA/itoa_interface/service filter="{\"title\": \"$clicked$\"}" fields="title,_key,base_service_template_id,entity_rules,service_tags,services_depends_on" | eval value=spath(value, "{}") | mvexpand value | eval "title"=spath(value, "title"), "service_id"=spath(value, "_key") | eval template_id=coalesce(spath(value, "base_service_template_id"), "n/a") | eval er=coalesce(spath(value, "entity_rules{}"), "n/a") | eval dependecies=spath(value, "services_depends_on{}") | mvexpand dependecies | eval child=spath(dependecies, "overloaded_urgencies") | rex field=child "\"(?<child>[^\"]+)\"[:\s]+(?<urgency>\d+)" | lookup service_kpi_lookup kpis._key as child OUTPUT title as child | eval children=child."::".urgency | eval "tags"=spath(value, "service_tags.tags{}") | lookup itsi_service_template_sync_status_lookup _key as template_id OUTPUT title as template_name | fields - _* splunk_server value | table title service_id template* er tags children
| mvexpand er | eval entity_rule_items=spath(er, "rule_items{}") | mvexpand entity_rule_items | eval entity_rules=printf("%s:%s %s %s", upper(spath(entity_rule_items, "field_type")), spath(entity_rule_items, "field"), case(spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type")=="matches", "==", spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type")=="notmatches", "!=", 1==1, upper(spath(entity_rule_items, "rule_type"))), spath(entity_rule_items, "value")) | stats values(*) as * by title service_id er | fields - er* | eval entity_rules=printf("------ %s ------", mvjoin(entity_rules, " ")) | stats values(*) as * by title service_id | table title service_id template* * | transpose | rename "row 1" as value | appendpipe [ | stats count | where count=0 | eval column="No Service called '$clicked$' found" | table column]
